Hey guys, JB here. It's Sunday. Hopefully most of you are off. If you're in a situation where you're working on Sunday, it's because you're probably off another day, work hard. But for the rest of you guys, wherever you are, where you're working now, I want you to know that you deserve to give yourself a pat on the back, all right? You're now two weeks into straight line certification and you're getting amazing results. Life is funny. It's real quick before I let you go with your families or whatever you're doing, right? Life is funny in the sense that you put in what you get out and there's just no two ways about it. It's weird that way, right? It's like there's no free lunches, but if you put the work into your own life, it's your life. Your life's not modeling. Your results are for you, not for me. You put into life what you get out and only you know, only you know if you're really putting your all into this. Are you? Be honest with yourself. Don't pull the wool over your own lives. Listen, you know, there's a level that you're capable of going to and it's definitely above where you are. And we always have that one little extra layer, no matter how hard work, no matter how hard trying, is one layer above that we can tap into. This is the time to tap into it. This coming week. Take your break today. Enjoy your life. Eat good. Feel good. Work out whatever it is to make you feel good. But tomorrow morning, Monday morning, I want you back and I want that pedal. This is it week three now. The pedal goes to the metal and I want this to be a sprint for the next nine weeks. Trust me. You do that. You will be living a whole different kind of life and a great one at that. All right. I love you all. We'll talk again tomorrow and starting three. Take care.
